msk.cluster.provisionedthroughput.CfnAbo: Specifies whether provisioned throughput is turned on and the volume throughput target.

msk.cluster.provisionedthroughput.Enable.Description: Specifies whether provisioned throughput is turned on for the cluster.

msk.cluster.provisionedthroughput.Volume.Description: The provisioned throughput rate in MiB per second.
